In this story:

Phoenix Mercury star Diana Taurasi broke some major news ahead of the United States women芒聙聶s Olympic basketball team芒聙聶s opener in the 2024 Paris Games.

Taurasi was asked whether this summer芒聙聶s Olympics was 芒聙聹it芒聙聺 for her, and the three-time WNBA champion didn芒聙聶t beat around the bush.

芒聙聹It芒聙聶s definitely it for USA Basketball,芒聙聺 Taurasi said. 芒聙聹I芒聙聶m 42. Six Olympics. It芒聙聶s just been such an honor to put that jersey on every single time.芒聙聺

The 2024 Paris Olympics will be her last Olympic Games, Diana Taurasi announced."I芒聙聶m 42. Six Olympics. It芒聙聶s just been such an honor to put that jersey on every single time." 冒聼聫pic.twitter.com/JX9BtyAIYt

Taurasi, 42, was selected to her record sixth Olympic squad earlier this summer and will be looking to become the first men芒聙聶s or women芒聙聶s basketball player to win six gold medals. The Mercury All-Star guard averaged 10.9 points, 3.0 rebounds and 2.6 assists throughout the last five Olympic competitions and is currently the all-time leader in games played at the Olympics with 38. Taurasi is ranked fourth on the Olympics all-time leading scorers list with 414 points.

Taurasi, a 2009 MVP, is in the middle of her 20th WNBA season and adds an undeniable veteran presence on a Team USA roster stacked with talented stars and playmakers including A芒聙聶ja Wilson, Breanna Stewart and Kelsey Plum, among others.

Team USA has never lost an Olympic game in which Taurasi was playing, though that win streak goes all the way back to the 1992 Barcelona Games, 12 years before Taurasi芒聙聶s Olympic debut.

芒聙聹I芒聙聶m just as addicted to basketball right now as I was when I was 15 playing in my driveway,芒聙聺 Taurasi said earlier this month. 芒聙聹I have the same ambitions, the same passion, the same love for it. I show up every single day in Phoenix at the practice facility at 7:30 a.m. ready to go. That芒聙聶s how I treat it. However, when it芒聙聶s done it芒聙聶s done.芒聙聺

Four years from now, Taurasi may still be spotted in Los Angeles, the host city for the 2028 Games, but chances areshe芒聙聶ll be enjoying a beer on the beach instead.

title: Diana Taurasi Makes Definitive Statement About Her Olympic Future After Paris Games
description: The all-time great had a major announcement ahead of the Paris Olympics.
